2UML.name: 2UML
2UML.description: A user-friendly tool that generates UMLs starting from natural language inputs.
2UML.overview: 2UML is an intuitive and efficient tool designed to streamline the process of creating Unified Modeling Language (UML) diagrams. With its user-friendly interface, 2UML empowers users to generate UML diagrams effortlessly from natural language inputs.
